texto: Oh my gosh, here they come, I'm on, oh yep, we're on, there's a lot, oh gosh, I'm getting destroyed in there, I might have multiple fish, I might have two, oh my god, they're all around me, I'm getting destroyed, look at all this, I have two fish, I have two, I have two, I'm flipping them both, oh gosh, that was a bad idea, whoa, what just happened?
